segments.text: Villager connects with the sniper shot for the KO!
segments.original_text: あてにとってきくざかり村人がスナイパーパチンコ一撃決めて撃墜

segments.text: Here we go! Rizeasu's Marth down 3 stocks to 1, tough spot, but lands the nair!
segments.original_text: さあRizeasuマルス3スト対1スト苦しい状況だがここは空N

full_text: Villager connects with the sniper shot for the KO! Here we go! Rizeasu's Marth down 3 stocks to 1, tough spot, but lands the nair!

corrections.original: リゼアスマルス3速対10速
